steps.title: Substitute x = 7 into the function
steps.content:
We need to find $f(7)$. Substitute $x = 7$ into the function definition:
$$f(7) = 5(7)^2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Calculate step by step:
  • First: $7^2 = 49$
  • Then: $5 \cdot 49 = 245$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
